## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Vapi and GrowthX to discuss SEO progress, strategies, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance improving rapidly: Rankings up from 6 to \~60 pages in top 40 results](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Optimization strategy working well: Articles jumping from position 60 to top 10 after tweaks](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Publishing cadence: 10 editorial articles/week + 100 programmatic pages/week, accelerating](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [MVP directory page for agents nearly ready, categorized by industry verticals initially](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [30% of published pages now ranking, 10% in top 10 results](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Jumped from 6 pages ranking in top 10 to \~60 pages in top 40 results](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Optimized \~20 articles, seeing jumps from position 60 to top 10 after tweaks](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Traffic increasing steadily, up 6% week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Exponential growth seen in last 2 weeks: up to 1000 impressions for new pages](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Dual focus on new content + optimization of existing pages](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Editorial: 62-63 articles published, aiming for 10/week (40/month minimum)](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO: 200 pages published, 100 more custom agents added today](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)
  - [Targeting AI snippets with definitional guides and LLM model comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [High click-through rates on niche, high-intent programmatic pages](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)

### Directory Page for Agents

  - [MVP nearly ready, frontend mostly complete](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [Initial categorization by industry verticals for simplicity](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [Will add function/archetype categorization in future iterations](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
  - [Yoshita recommends including function tagging from the start for better searchability](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)

### Product Demo Request

  - [GrowthX team requesting a sales demo-style walkthrough of Vapi dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)
  - [To be recorded as a video, focusing on typical sales pitch to new leads](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1968.0)
  - [Yoshita to provide more details via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)

### Model Prioritization

  - [GrowthX team has sufficient info from previously shared lists](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=2072.0)
  - [Vapi team to provide access to internal tracking system for model updates bi-weekly](https://fathom.video/share/AUbnh6yxM5V-Kgj_gMjSpJj36UnUmZQy?tab=summary&timestamp=2168.0)

## Next Steps
